---
title: "Alethea Buchanan Mackarness"
---

## Alethea Buchanan Mackarness

**Dates:** (1826-30 March 1909)

**Maiden name:** (Coleridge)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Daughter of Sir John Taylor Coleridge and sister of Mary Coleridge, she married (7 Aug 1845) the Rt. Rev. John Fielder Mackarness (1820-1889); she was very ill in November 1851. [<i>Story of a Devonshire House</i>; PB 1914 Coleridge; Coleridge, <i>Life of Keble</i> 361]

### Letters

- Letter from March 24th [1896?][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from [December 1889]
- Letter from July 3d [1876]
- Letter from Decr 13th [1869]
- Letter from Novr 6 th [1869]
- Letter from Aug 4th [1863]
- Letter from Oct 22d [1851[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from October 29 [1849]
- Letter from May 14, 1848
- Letter from Sept 19th  [1846[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from July 22d [1845[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from April 19th  [1845[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
